{{Quote|This is nowhere near Corellia. Have they gone rogue?|[[Sev/Legends|Sev]]|<ref name="RC" />}}
The '''Chaykin Cluster''' was a [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]] in the [[Chaykin sector/Legends|Chaykin sector]]
of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It contained the [[Corbantis system/Legends|Corbantis system]].<ref name="RC" />

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was located in the outskirts of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] space.<ref name="RC" />

The [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|Republic Assault Ship]] ''[[Prosecutor]]'' was meant to be patrolling the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]], before it was [[Mission to the Chaykin Cluster|taken over]] by [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspaced]] to the [[Corbantis system/Legends|Corbantis system]] within the cluster, to rendezvous with a [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Droid Control Ship]]. [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] was sent to investigate and eventually destroyed all attacking enemy forces.<ref name="RC" />

==Behind the scenes==
It was incorrectly spelt as the "Chykin Cluster" in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando: Prima Official Game Guide]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' {{1st}}
